chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 123 of 2025 (Masroor Ahmed Kario versus The State) Before: Mr. Mahmood A. Khan, J. Mr. Khalid Hussain Shahani, J. Date of hearing: 11.02.2026 Date of decision: 11.02.2026 Mr. Sajid Ali Kalhoro, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. O R D E R Mahmood A. Khan, J. – Present applicant seeks bail in Crime No.170 of 2025, registered at Police Station Moro, District Naushahro Feroze, under Sections 302, 324, 353, 397, 398, 337-H, 341, 427, 431, 435, 114, 147, 148, 149, 109, 337-A(ii), 337-F(i), 337-F(iii), PPC, and Section 6/7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997, wherein he is alleged to be one of the members of the mob, who had caused the overt act. 2. Learned Counsel for the applicant contends that the present applicant is not named in the FIR and his name has come up in the further statement under Section 161, Cr.P.C. He also contends that co-accused, namely Amjad Ali S/o Muhammad Hassan, Javed Ali S/o Muhammad Hassan and Muhammad Yousif S/o Abdul Razaque, having similar role, have been granted bail in Cr. Bail Application No. D-61 of 2025 by order dated 16.09.2025. 3. Learned Additional Prosecutor General, in view of the ground of consistency, does not severely oppose the bail. 4. The present applicant accordingly on the ground of consistency and the fore given is granted bail. The application stands allowed. Let the applicant be released against the surety of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and the P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
